meaning: n.[鐭縘閽ㄩ敯閾佺熆,閾侀敯閲嶇煶
examples: The wetting character of wolframite is anisotropic.
Diluted nitric acid is used as a selective solvent to separate scheelite from wolframite.
In ordinary chemical phase analyses of tungsten only tungstite, scheelite and wolframite are dealt with.
Apart from gold, they illicitly sell cassiterite (used in laptops), coltan (mobile phones) and wolframite (light bulbs).
